seeds.value: Define your churn risk thresholds here. Example: high_risk: score above 0.8, medium_risk: 0.5-0.8, low_risk: below 0.5.
seeds.description: Thresholds for classifying churn risk levels

seeds.value: Define key engagement signals here. Example: login_frequency, feature_usage, support_tickets, session_duration.
seeds.description: Activity signals used to predict churn
